descripcion: Is this sentence correct? Check adverb placement and prepositions!

misiones.instruccion: Read the sentence and decide if it is grammatically correct.

retos.explicacion: Correcto! Always va antes del verbo: I always play
Never va ANTES del verbo: She never eats, no She eats never

retos.oracion: They sometimes go to the park
retos.explicacion: Correcto! Sometimes va antes del verbo: They sometimes go
Usually va ANTES del verbo: He usually reads, no He reads usually
Correcto! Every day va al final de la oracion
Con dias de la semana se usa ON, no IN: on Mondays

retos.oracion: We eat breakfast on the morning
retos.correccion: We eat breakfast in the morning
retos.explicacion: Con morning/afternoon/evening se usa IN, no ON: in the morning

retos.oracion: He goes to bed at night
retos.traduccion: Se va a la cama en la noche
retos.explicacion: Correcto! Con night se usa AT: at night
